outcome.text:
33.2.5 *Plantago lanceolata*-Typ

9–16 poriën; 2,0–5,0 µm; schijfvormige gladde opercula. Anulus (1,0)1,5–2,0(2,5) µm. Verrucae 1,5–4,5 µm. Exine 0,8–1,2 µm.
Porieaantallen: *P. lanceolata* 9–15; *P. altissima* 12–16; *P. argentea* 10–15; *P. lagopus* 9–14.

*Plantago altissima* L. (2)
30,0–39,8 µm, MiW 34,8 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Plantago argentea* CHAIX (4)
21,8–29,8 µm, MiW 26,1 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Plantago lagopus* L. (2)
24,8–31,3 µm, MiW 27,8 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Plantago lanceolata* L. (7)
22,3–27,8 µm, MiW 25,4 µm; 50 PK, 0a
